nasb.text: The disciples *said to Him, “Rabbi, the Jews were just now seeking to stone You, and are You going there again?”

esv.text: The disciples said to him, “Rabbi, the Jews were just now seeking to stone you, and are you going there again?”

cnv.text: 門徒對他說：“拉比，近來猶太人要拿石頭打你，你還到那裡去嗎？”

ccb.text: 门徒说：“老师，犹太人近来想拿石头打你，你还要去那里吗？”

csbs.text: 门徒们说：“拉比，近来犹太人想用石头砸死你，你还再到那里去吗？”
